title: polygala albicans
intro: Polygala albicans, also known as Yuzuru or White Polygala, is a perennial plant species in the Polygalaceae family, traditionally used in East Asian medicine. The plant's roots, leaves, and stems contain various bioactive compounds, such as flavonoids and alkaloids, which are believed to exhibit medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Polygala albicans are thought to include enhancing immune function, reducing fever, and treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. In traditional herbal preparations, the roots and stems of Polygala albicans are often decocted or dried to make teas, soups, or tinctures for medicinal purposes.
